title: Coding Prompts, Scoped Edits, and Regression Control
description: Implement a repository change with tests and minimal unrelated churn. Learners cumulatively produce a coding-agent implementation brief through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Name desired behavior, relevant area, preserved contracts, and authorized refactor scope.
Ground implementation in repository commands, architecture, dependency policy, and local instructions.
Specify risk-proportionate tests and observable regression checks.
